'''Reydon''' was an [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] who served in the [[Battle of Keskin]] manning an [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Web heavy repeating blaster]] alongside [[Ohvan]].
